The Science

Your Body Already Knows
How to Burn Fat.

Three hormones control everything. This book teaches you how to work with them — not against them.

Insulin

Fat Storage Switch

Spikes with sugar & refined carbs, locking fat in storage. Learn exactly which foods keep it stable so your body burns fat freely.

Leptin

Fullness Hormone

Tells your brain you're full — but can become resistant. Restore its sensitivity through diet, sleep, and lifestyle adjustments.

GLP-1

Your Natural Ozempic

The same hormone that $1,200/month injections try to mimic — you can boost it naturally with real food. No needle needed.
